step_rationale: Lipoprotein-metabolism regulator; suppresses TRL-remnant cholesterol and atherosclerosis.
mechanism: ANGPTL3 reduces triglyceride-rich lipoprotein atherogenicity and predicts adverse atherosclerotic events.

references.title: Multi-omics data integration from patients with carotid stenosis illuminates key molecular signatures of atherosclerotic instability.
Remnant cholesterol - The transition from biomarker to risk factor.
Angiopoietin-like proteins in atherosclerosis.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry

references.title: Post-GWAS methodologies for localisation of functional non-coding variants: ANGPTL3.
